message:
🐛 Strengthen E2E test assertions and fix route mock gaps (#11161)

- Remove dead constants (MIN_REPO_LENGTH) and unused imports (setupDemoMode)
- Fix remove-button test: assert count > 0 AND visibility, not just toBeAttached
- Fix remove-click test: assert pill disappeared after removal
- Fix manage dropdown test: verify hidden repos listed, not just reset option
- Fix refresh test: verify SVG class state change after click (not just existence)
- Add actual expand/details test for run rows
- Fix logs modal content test: assert log-like content, not just any text
- Fix logs error test: assert error-specific content, not generic placeholder
- Fix stat-name test: assert visibleCount > 0 (was computed but never asserted)
- Fix repo pill selector: scope to filter bar to avoid nondeterministic clicks
- Fix Add Repo test: verify page title in demo mode fallback path
- Fix visual spec: replace .catch(() => {}) with proper expect() assertions

Signed-off-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
